overall.description: A scene from the video game Hogwarts Legacy depicting the interior of The Three Broomsticks tavern. A character in wizard robes sits at a wooden table near a roaring fireplace while warm firelight illuminates the timber-framed medieval architecture. A server walks through the background carrying a tray.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval tavern interior with fireplace and dining tables

agents.ego_description: sitting at a wooden table near the wall, occasionally shifting position and raising a hand to drink from a cup

notable_agents.action: waitress in white blouse and long skirt walking from left to right carrying a tray, passing behind the seated character

entered.detail: carved wooden tavern sign mounted on the upper beam with the name illuminated by warm light
large stone hearth with active fire burning, providing warm orange illumination to the room
thick timber structural beam in the foreground on the right side of the frame
rustic wooden table where the character is seated, with visible wood grain and simple construction
several small framed pictures hanging on the back wall between the fireplace and the pillar
tall rectangular framed painting of a figure in robes hanging on the right wall
exposed dark timber beams supporting the ceiling with a second floor balcony visible above

segments.scene_description: The scene takes place entirely within The Three Broomsticks tavern, a cozy medieval establishment with timber-framed architecture and a roaring stone fireplace. The camera maintains a steady third-person view of a character sitting at a wooden table, occasionally sipping from a cup. At approximately 36 seconds, a waitress walks from left to right in the background carrying a tray, briefly passing through the scene. The warm firelight casts a golden glow across the wooden floors and walls, creating an intimate atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, intimate perspective within the cozy interior of The Three Broomsticks tavern, where the warm glow of a fireplace defines the atmosphere. It begins with a focused view of a character in wizard robes sitting at a wooden table, occasionally sipping from a cup amidst the timber-framed medieval architecture. As the camera lingers, the scene expands to include the background movement of a waitress carrying a tray from left to right. The shot finally settles on the interplay of golden firelight casting deep shadows across the wooden floors and walls, reinforcing the tavern's rustic charm.
